properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's work to be done lots of victories to be won There's joys up the road that have never yet been told There's a mansion awaiting me in that land by faith I see And I'm a gonna keep on working till he comes

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm gonna keep on a working' till He comes, till He comes There's nothing' in this world worth turning around to see My eyes are on the prize that's awaiting' me by and by And I'm gonna keep on working till He comes, oh yes

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's a message to be preached, there are souls to be reached There are hungry to be fed little children to be led There's a river flowing' free for the soul who's in need And I'm gonna keep on preaching till he comes

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There are songs from above that are filled with joy and love There are melodies of His peace that make the turmoil cease There are gifts from above that assure me of His love And I'm gonna keep on singing till He comes
